data.title: Atomic Clock Market projected to reach USD 1,281.8 million by 2036 with 7.0% CAGR, up from USD 651.6 million in 2026.
data.description: In Newark, Delaware, on February 13, 2026, market research firm Future Market Insights (FMI) has reported that the Atomic Clock Market is valued at approximately USD 651.6 million in 2026. FMI predicts that the market will see significant growth, reaching an estimated USD 1,281.8 million by 2036, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.0%. The surge in the market is attributed to the increasing reliance on modern systems.

data.title: ACR appoints Michael Wessner to Board. Wessner, experienced in e-commerce and private equity, joins leadership team.
data.description: ACR, headquartered in Exton, Pennsylvania, shared on February 13, 2026, that Michael Wessner, a seasoned executive with extensive experience in distribution, e-commerce, and private equity, has recently joined their team. ACR is a prominent supplier of vital foodservice and operational supplies. This move is expected to bring in significant expertise and leadership to the company.

data.title: Elanco Animal Health Incorporated announced updates to its Board of Directors: R. David Hoover and Deborah Kochevar will not stand for re-election.
data.description: Elanco Animal Health Inc. (NYSE: ELAN) revealed changes to its Board of Directors today, with R. David Hoover and Deborah Kochevar opting out of re-election at the end of their terms at the 2026 Annual Shareholders Meeting in Indianapolis on Feb. 13.

data.title: Boliden secures EUR 1,000m credit deal with 12 banks, split into 5-year and 3-year tranches.
data.description: In Stockholm on February 13, 2026, Boliden announced a new syndicated revolving credit facilities agreement with a total of EUR 1,000 million involving 12 banks. The credit facilities are divided into two tranches - one with a duration of five years and amounting to EUR 500 million, and the other lasting three years with the same sum. This agreement marks a significant financial arrangement for Boliden, providing them with access to substantial funding for their operations.

data.title: AVITA Medical to host investor webinar discussing Q4 and full-year 2025 results, with business update and live Q&A.
data.description: AVITA Medical will be hosting an investor webinar to discuss their Q4 and full-year 2025 financial results, along with a business update. The webinar will also include a live question and answer session for investors.

data.title: US inflation dropped to 2.4%, lowest in 8 months. Core inflation also decreased to 2.5%. Monthly CPI rose 0.2%.
data.description: The latest data shows that price pressures in the U.S. have lessened as the annual consumer-price inflation rate dropped from 2.7% in December to 2.4% in January 2026. This figure was below the anticipated 2.5% and represents the lowest inflation rate since May 2025. The headline CPI saw a 0.2% increase on a monthly basis, slightly lower than both the previous reading and the expected 0.3%. Core inflation, excluding food and energy prices, also decreased from 2.6% in December to 2.5% in January, aligning with predictions. This signifies the lowest core inflation rate recorded since March 2021. On a monthly basis, core CPI rose by 0.3%, in line with forecasts and a slight increase from December's 0.2%.
